The Supersoul or the Paramatma infuses extra intelligence into the devotee beyond his karma, arranges extra
बला beyond his own karma to do something, arranges skills which normally he would never get access to according to his karma,
and achieves the thing beyond his karma when it is for the Lord, when it is for the Lord, now whether it is for the Lord or not, that definition will come to it later,
it is not that Krishna conscious philosophy is applicable and limited to only people who are doing preaching mission,
yes, those who are doing preaching, for instance, we try to build this temple, all the ज्ञाना, बला and क्रिया did not come out of few individuals' कर्मा, it did not come out of it,
whatever Krishna says, I provide what you lack, I maintain what you have, this is assurance Krishna gives in Bhagavad Gita, I provide what you lack for his devotees,
it is,
it is his promise, I provide what you lack, but the devotee does not define what he lacks, in the sense, he is just doing his work, he knows the Lord will provide him what he lacks,
what ज्ञाना, बला, क्रिया, प्रेर्णा, everything that he lacks, he will provide, he has that faith,
and his life is made up of that faith and reciprocation from नाम प्रभुगुण।
This is an excited way of living life, than living your simply destiny,
destiny, anyway, is going to happen,
what is exciting about it?

destiny means,
